moments.author: Mark Zuckerberg
moments.quote: Today we’re releasing Muse Spark 1.1 — a strong agentic and coding model at a very low price.
moments.why: Zuck broke a 3‑year silence on X to launch Meta’s AI model, prompting widespread buzz in tech men’s circles.
moments.url: https://www.timesofindia.com/…article where news covered his X post

moments.author: Mark Zuckerberg
moments.quote: Muse Spark 1.1 is strongest at agentic performance… can delegate execution to sub‑agents running in parallel… trained to use computer interfaces.
moments.why: The technical sneak‑peek details from Zuck’s post sparked deep discussion among tech enthusiasts.
moments.url: India Today article about his X comeback

moments.author: Jaylen Brown
moments.quote: Don’t become a basketball player. There’s no loyalty, there’s no love.
moments.why: Brown’s raw reaction to being traded resonates for showing the brutal side of pro sports.

moments.author: Giannis Antetokounmpo
moments.quote: The city of Milwaukee will always be in my heart… Milwaukee will always be my city, my team, my family.
moments.why: Giannis’s farewell message drew massive attention as he transitions to Miami.

moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: X is a great platform for product announcements… This post by Mark Zuckerberg already received over 12 million views for free!
moments.why: Musk’s endorsement amplified Zuck’s comeback announcement, fueling the conversation.
